notes: Focused source/review cleanup on the v4.3.160 live line.
Corrected Gyroporus borealis/smithii food_quality_score to match avoid/not-recommended framing while leaving review-needed status intact.
Added USDA FEIS Rubus parviflorus range, habitat, ecology, and regional relevance support to Thimbleberries without treating common ripe-fruit edibility as unresolved.
Cleaned Xanthoconium purpureum stale source-note text, added structured MushroomExpert ID support, and moved use_roles away from normal food-card framing.
Left Chalciporus pseudorubinellus, Chalciporus rubinellus, and Porphyrellus porphyrosporus review flags unchanged pending stronger species-level sources.
